$schema_note: PaddleBoard Store catalog. Edit via PR. See crates/paddleboard_store/src/catalog.rs for the schema.

agents.name: Zed Agent
agents.description: First-party agent backed by Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google models. Sign in to use.

agents.name: Claude Agent
agents.description: Anthropic's Claude agent over ACP. Streaming tool use, persistent threads, multi-modal.

agents.name: Codex CLI
agents.description: OpenAI's terminal coding agent. Runs locally; bring your own API key.

agents.name: GitHub Copilot
agents.description: GitHub's coding assistant. Sign in with your GitHub account.

agents.name: Cursor
agents.description: Cursor's agent over ACP. Connects to the Cursor backend.

skills.name: /build
skills.description: Build PaddleBoard via cargo. Use `bundle` for a macOS .app, `install` to drop it into /Applications.

skills.name: /update-tour
skills.description: Sync the in-app first-launch tour with the latest WELCOME.md after a user-facing change.

skills.name: /verify
skills.description: Run the app and confirm a change actually does what it's supposed to do.

skills.name: /simplify
skills.description: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.

skills.name: /security-review
skills.description: Run a complete security review of pending changes on the current branch.

mcp_servers.name: Filesystem
mcp_servers.description: Read, write, and list files under a directory you allow.

mcp_servers.name: Fetch
mcp_servers.description: HTTP fetch for URLs, returning markdown-converted text.

mcp_servers.name: Git
mcp_servers.description: Inspect git history, branches, diffs, and blame for a repository.

mcp_servers.name: GitHub
mcp_servers.description: Read and write to GitHub repos, issues, and PRs via the GitHub API.

mcp_servers.name: Puppeteer
mcp_servers.description: Headless browser automation: navigate pages, take screenshots, scrape content.
